title: CLI Dashboard: script-rendered deterministic output replacing LLM template filling
description: Current /test-supervisor db relies on LLM reading a 140-line template and filling values, causing inconsistent formatting and wasted context. Redesign: create dashboard-renderer.sh that reads state.json + round summaries + discoveries and outputs formatted text directly. Simplify modes/dashboard.md from 140 lines to ~3 lines. Key design: Attention section first (red/yellow priority items), trend arrows, one-screen constraint (≤25 lines), queue heads only.
